message:
Support custom issue types in Beads UI (bd-h5b3)

The API already accepts any string for issue types via z.string() validation.
This update makes the UI match by:
- Computing available types dynamically from beads data
- Removing strict TypeScript type constraints on type state
- Preserving custom type values when editing beads
- Rendering custom types gracefully in select dropdowns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
